narrative:
Precinct Dresden North (precinct in Muskingum County) has 582 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
